title: Seth Rogen says writers using AI "shouldn't be a writer"
description: Seth Rogen has strongly criticised the use of artificial intelligence in screenwriting, saying writers who rely on AI tools "shouldn't be a writer."

title: StanChart CEO says AI to replace ‘lower-value human capital’
description: Standard Chartered Plc Chief Executive Officer Bill Winters delivered a blunt message on the future of the bank's workforce, warning that a push into artificial intelligence will eliminate thousands of roles as the lender replaces "lower-value human capital" with technology.
